introSection: Space Shuttle is a steel shuttle roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Enchanted Kingdom in Santa Rosa, Laguna, Philippines.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened at West Midland Safari Park in 1985 as Cobra.

Space Shuttle will close from 1 July to 30 September 2025 for an upgrade.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Space Shuttle's design is like any other Vekoma Boomerang installation, with a cobra roll and a vertical loop.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and light purple supports. The ride used to feature black track and supports, with white track and supports at West Midland Safari Park, which was later repainted to red track and black supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride opened with trains built by Arrow Dynamics, these where replaced with Vekoma build trains sometime around 2010.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Space Shuttle on the parks website

fullText:
Space Shuttle is a steel shuttle roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Enchanted Kingdom in Santa Rosa, Laguna, Philippines.

The ride first opened at West Midland Safari Park in 1985 as Cobra.

Space Shuttle will close from 1 July to 30 September 2025 for an upgrade.

Space Shuttle's design is like any other Vekoma Boomerang installation, with a cobra roll and a vertical loop.

Red track and light purple supports. The ride used to feature black track and supports, with white track and supports at West Midland Safari Park, which was later repainted to red track and black supports.

The ride opened with trains built by Arrow Dynamics, these where replaced with Vekoma build trains sometime around 2010.


 * Space Shuttle on the parks website
